prompt: You are ginb on live task t_example. Canonical verification and candidate-baseline validation have passed. HEAD is abc123 and the only linked target artifact is docs/briefs/DM-42.md. Show the exact completion sequence and metadata. The card becomes terminal on completion, so the answer must prevent an incomplete first call.
assertions: Constructs artifact_baseline with commit abc123 and exactly docs/briefs/DM-42.md
States that the first and only completion call includes metadata
Does not propose completing first and editing or retrying metadata afterward
Reruns the harness against the completed live card without candidate overrides
